note: Special-generator flag list for the stage-1 screen's b4 dummy (spec 01 s3.1-3.2; registry entry special_generators, config tier, basis judgment). Hand-coded judgment data, NOT regenerable -- edits require an append-only history entry on the registry entry (panel D15). Coordinates are site centroids to 4dp (adequate for a 0.9-mi catchment buffer test); type in {resort, college, medical}. The b4 dummy is derived geometrically on BOTH fit and scan sides inside the shared compute_predictors: any listed generator within the buffer of the catchment window. Upgrade path: measured magnitudes (enrollment / attendance / LEHD workplace counts).
